Class GameController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interactable, Updatable
public class GameController extends Object implements Updatable, Interactable
GameController manages the play state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.

It coordinates the GameView, OverlayController, and BoardController to render and control the in game interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController(GameView view, AudioController audioController)
      Constructs a GameController object with the given GameView.

      Initializes the overlay and board components for gameplay.

      Parameters:
      view - the playing view used to render gameplay to the panel.

      Updates the overlay used by the PlayingController.

      update in interface Updatable

      Draws the GameView, OverlayController, and BoardController.

      g - the Graphics context used for rendering

    • mousePressed

      public void mousePressed(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with OverlayController and BoardController when a mouse button has been pressed.
      Specified by:
      mousePressed in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse press status

    • mouseReleased

      public void mouseReleased(MouseEvent e)
      Communicates with OverlayController when the mouse has been released.
      Specified by:
      mouseReleased in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the mouse release status

    • mouseMoved

      public void mouseMoved(MouseEvent e)
      Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
      Specified by:
      mouseMoved in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      e - the MouseEvent containing the new mouse position
